creator: carlavilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
I upgraded all except this:

> Consider adding a paragraph to address the somewhat stereotypical view that use of FreeBSD (or FreeBSD on notebooks), by FreeBSD developers, is unusual (or a rarity). 

> Please see, for example: <https://old.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/u5nkli/-/i54c1st/>

I'm not gonna enter in this game hehe

Btw, thanks for this and for your work in the documentation :)
